title: Dev Environment Settings
description: Configuration for Claude Code development environment. Split across settings.json (project, committed) and settings.local.json (user, gitignored).

companyName.description: Display name of the company/org (e.g., Acme Corp, NotMyself.IO)

shortName.description: Short prefix used in repo names and identifiers (e.g., tw, nme)

plugin.description: Plugin deployment settings (in settings.json, committed, fork-specific)

marketplace.description: Marketplace where the plugin is registered for discovery

name.description: Marketplace identifier used in plugin spec (e.g., devenv-workflow)

githubRepo.description: GitHub owner/repo for the marketplace (e.g., your-org/ai-devenv-workflow)

gitRemote.description: Git SSH remote URL for marketplace clone/push operations

repoUrl.description: HTTPS marketplace repo URL for links

distribution.description: Plugin distribution repo where actual plugin files are published

githubRepo.description: GitHub owner/repo for the plugin distribution (e.g., your-org/ai-plugin-devenv)

gitRemote.description: Git SSH remote URL for plugin clone/push operations

repoUrl.description: HTTPS plugin repo URL for changelogs and links

azureDevOps.description: Azure DevOps settings (in settings.json, committed, optional)

area.description: Default area path for work items

defaultIteration.description: Default iteration path for work items

sync.description: Repository sync configuration (in settings.json, committed). Replaces .claude/sync-config.json.

peerRepo.description: Absolute path to peer fork repository for bidirectional sync

exclusions.description: Files and paths to protect during sync operations

files.description: Filenames to skip for this category

protectedJsonPaths.description: Dot-notation JSON paths to preserve during merge

protectedSections.description: Markdown heading strings to preserve during merge

nameTransforms.description: Content substitutions applied during sync (e.g., company name changes)

from.description: Text to find in incoming content

email.description: User's email address for this project
